item.title: She has a heartbeat too
item.description: Viral edit: please read, this is why I chose this title Woman dies after abortion request 'refused' at Galway hospital https://www.bbc.com/news/uk-northern-ireland-20321741.amp After this happened there were protests in Ireland, their slogan "she had a heartbeat too" highlighting the fact that killing one person for the chance to save another (even when the other's chance of life is less than 1%) is fundamentally wrong, and super fucked up. What they're saying is they'll gladly sacrifice your life, your one messed up pregnancy that would kill you, just to keep the many from choosing their own path. If you think this isn't directly related to the greed of the capitalism machine.... You better wake up and pay attention.
item.dc:creator: ifyouwanttoknowmoreaboutparanoidpeoplejustfollowthemaround

item.title: Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Wednesday

Welcome to the 231st installment in this series Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/AE8TIbF Day 221-230 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/B81rJcL Days 211-220 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/lwhZE43 Days 201-210 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/fBko2Pg Fourth 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/Jtm8Lqz Third 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/XvE00DP Second 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/ewb2izC First 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/iqtNz8u
It's Nanna Pants ＼(°o°)／
MrsPuckett puts up with a lot
MrsPuckett puts up with a lot part 2
PJ does this every single night
MrsPuckett puts up with a lot part 3
Always gotta steal the kisses
My 6 year old, 2 year old and 16 year old puppies The Pucketts ... I'm doing a fundraiser to help the Humane Association continue rescuing dogs like Nanna. I'd love it if you checked out my link below https://www.classy.org/fundraiser/3793511 ... Have a beautiful day everyone, see you soon

item.title: The crank shaft of Shay No. 11, powered by three vertical steam cylinders.
item.description: No. 11 was built in 1923 by the Lima Locomotive Works for the Hutchinson Lumber Co. of Oroville, Ca. Following its logging career, the locomotive was conveyed to the Pacific Southwest Railway Museum where it was cared for until being sold to Cass in 1997. Today, No. 11 can often be seen powering the Bald Knob train up the mountain.
item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: Am I effing crazy?! Opinions appreciated
item.description:
It hurts to breath. Genuinely, every inhale hurts. I cannot lay on one side without losing my breath. If I twist the wrong way, I yelp in pain.
I tried to tell my doctor something was wrong. My rib cage hurts to the lightest touch. It feels like something is broken. But when I told him that, he said I wouldn’t be walking around if I had a broken rib. But I swear to god, it hurts every second. And I know I’m a bit anatomically lopsided, but does one of my ribs look swollen? I’m not trying to be a hypochondriac, but I feel like I was just brushed aside. It’s just frustrating he refused to x-ray me or anything. No pain meds, nothing. I just lay here hoping breathing gets easier soon.
item.dc:creator: snakevenominablackdress
